Faelin`s Ring

Slot: FINGER
WT: 0.1 Size: TINY
Class: ALL
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Faelin`s Ring
Lore Item No Trade Quest Item
Slot: FINGER
WT: 0.1 Size: TINY
Class: ALL
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)

Item Lore:Personal Ring of Faelin
Item Type:Jewelry
Stackable:No
Lucy Entry By:VaderFLAG
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2021-07-27 07:10:51
Page Updated:Tue Jan 14th, 2014

Expansion: Ruins of Kunark
Rarity: Common
Level to Attain: 50
[Given | Quests | Comments ]

Obtained From

This item is obtained from NPCs.

Greater Faydark
NPC Name Expansion
Faelin Bloodbriar Ruins of Kunark

Quests

This item is used in quests.
Expansion List - Premium only.

Burning Woods
Quest Name
Druid Epic: Nature Walker's Scimitar
Ranger Epic: Swiftwind and Earthcaller

Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Greater Faydark
Obtained by handing Faelin Bloodbriar a "Worn Note" as part of the Ranger Epic.
Send a correction
Post Comment
PH "orc pawn"
QuoteReply
# Mar 28 2014 at 2:36 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1626049512231
2 posts
Yes it does not take 2 hours between spawns it is just random, I messed up on the DE Corrupter part and had to restart epic, so I was able to spawn her twice in less then an hour. So with that being said, hang at her spawn location, +1500, +500, +20.70, use track and sort it by distance and you should see "orc pawn" if she is not on track, just kill that then hang at the spawn location for another 2m20sec and hope she pops soon!
▲ Page top
ergh
QuoteReply
# Feb 11 2007 at 12:36 PM Rating: Decent
hotrod
View User Forum
Scholar
430 posts
gave her note, got text, but no ring...
____________________________
Life needs more cowbell.

Shaere
▲ Page top
Faeling Bloodbriar
QuoteReply
# Jan 02 2006 at 10:17 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1719792988335
679 posts
I sat at plus 1536 plus 545 for three hours one night killing orc pawns that hit me as I sat there talking.... I may have missed her spawn because the next day when she spawned... I just about missed her and I was paying attention.... she takes off running the minute she spawns and I could never get her to stop so I handed it to her on the run and got the ring.... So my suggestion is to pay attention and have someone with you that can watch your back and help you to notice when she spawns.... doing tradeskills and talking in tell are not things that let you pay good attention to what spawns close to you smile... but neither is killing orcs very far from this spot.... She spawned for me at 10 pm ish game time... When I go back with a friend we will start about that time and when I take my other rangers on other servers I will start close to that time and follow my own advice... hehe... Good luck to all who try this...
▲ Page top
Got her
QuoteReply
# Jan 05 2004 at 4:37 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592258821832
11 posts
I got her twice in a span of two days (after not killing the corruptor fast enough). First time, I camped 1500, 500 and killed every orc that passed me. Within 90 minutes, she spawned. The second time, as soon as I zoned in, she was up and running. So, it appears that patience is the most important thing. The orcs are on 8 minute timers. So, bring a book or some tradeskills to work on. Good luck.
▲ Page top
faelin
QuoteReply
# Jun 17 2003 at 5:32 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591788422856
4 posts
i have heard that peeps have waiting up to 6or8 hrs and still no spawn of is this true how offten to rare spawns spawn
▲ Page top
Faeling's PH
QuoteReply
# Jun 07 2003 at 7:03 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591787969332
274 posts
"Faelin Bloodbriar spawns at POS 1500, POS 500 in Greater Faydark. Her placeholder is an Orc pawn. Faelin is a rare spawn. Just hang around this area and kill all Orc pawns you see around the area. Once you see either Faelin or an Orc pawn spawn, you can proceed to camp just that spot and not worry about additional Orcs."

- from eqrangers.com
▲ Page top
Faeling Bloodbriar
